## Summary

Describe the feature or workflow you want.

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Workflow

Describe the behavior or workflow you want to see.

## Current Workaround

If you have one, describe your current workaround.

## Additional Context

Add examples, screenshots, or references if relevant.
